checks: Invoice math is verified (Subtotal + Tax = Total)
compliance_advisor.recommendation: SYSTEM ALERT: Discrepancies found. Review fraud signals and AI-drafted vendor email before proceeding.

draft_vendor_email.subject: Action Required: Compliance Issue with Invoice 2017-40
draft_vendor_email.body:
Dear VERVE Financial Services Private Limited team,

We are writing to bring to your attention a compliance issue with invoice #2017-40, dated [date not provided]. Our system has flagged this invoice due to a non-standard Vendor GSTIN format.

Specifically, the GSTIN format detected on the invoice is invalid. As per our records, a valid GSTIN is a 15-digit number, and we require this information to be in the correct format to process payments.

We kindly request that you review the invoice and provide a corrected version with the accurate GSTIN information. This will enable us to proceed with the payment of 4899.36 INR.

Please find the details of the invoice in question below:
- Invoice #: 2017-40
- Total Amount: 4899.36 INR

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter, and we look forward to receiving the corrected invoice at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Compliance Team, CompliancePilot AI
